algorithm.donor_order_notes: RICS replay buckets donors as warehouse/no-model stock first, then SKU-stores at or below total model by lower M-T-D turns, then SKU-stores over total model by largest total surplus.
algorithm.receiver_order_notes: RICS replay gives receiver priority to higher M-T-D turns, then lower store number for ties.
algorithm.keyword_notes: RP20ABR is present in the RICS report; <><>RP20ABR is not treated as an exclusion here.
algorithm.negative_mtd_sales_rule: Skip a SKU if any selected store has negative total M-T-D sales for that SKU.
